title: Carol's Design Notes
description: Design systems, typography, and creative coding

items.title: Variable Fonts Are Underrated
items.summary: Most sites still ship 4+ font files. Variable fonts can replace them all with one file and unlock dynamic typography.

items.title: Design Tokens: From Figma to CSS Custom Properties
items.summary: A pipeline for syncing design tokens from Figma into your codebase using Style Dictionary and CSS custom properties.

items.title: Generative Art with SVG and JavaScript
items.summary: Creating algorithmic artwork using nothing but SVG and vanilla JS. No canvas, no WebGL — just vectors.

items.title: oklch() Changed How I Think About Color
items.summary: Why perceptual color spaces matter for design systems, and how oklch() makes everything easier.
